case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC VS. STEPHANIE A. ARORA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARORA, STEPHANIE A. $4,171.40 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,407.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ARORA, STEPHANIE A. DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC SERVED MAY-18-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARORA, STEPHANIE A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585; COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS; INTEREST WAIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE OF JUDGMENT (JUD100) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC SERVED NOV-08-2012, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ARORA, STEPHANIE A.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ARORA, STEPHANIE A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ARORA, STEPHANIE A.
